rules.explanation_for_clinician: Antidepressants carry a boxed warning for increased suicidality in patients under 25; if used, start with close monitoring and safety planning.
monitoring_required: Close monitoring for emergent suicidality, especially early in treatment and after dose changes.

rules.explanation_for_clinician: Atomoxetine carries a boxed warning for suicidal ideation in children/adolescents; monitor mood after initiation and dose changes.
Paediatric psychotropic prescribing generally warrants child-and-adolescent psychiatry involvement; fewer agents are licensed and dosing differs.
